claims.text: Reinforcement Learning in Traffic Signal Control faces significant hurdles in real-world deployment due to limited generalization to dynamic traffic flow variations.
claims.source_quote: Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Traffic Signal Control (TSC) faces significant hurdles in real-world deployment due to limited generalization to dynamic traffic flow variations.

claims.text: Existing approaches to RL-based traffic signal control often overfit static patterns.
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often overfit static patterns and use action spaces incompatible with driver expectations.

claims.text: Existing approaches to RL-based traffic signal control use action spaces incompatible with driver expectations.
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often overfit static patterns and use action spaces incompatible with driver expectations.

claims.text: The proposed Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning framework was validated in the Vissim traffic simulator.
claims.source_quote: This paper proposes a robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) framework validated in the Vissim traffic simulator.

claims.text: The framework integrates three mechanisms: Turning Ratio Randomization, Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space, and a Neighbor-Based Observation scheme.
claims.source_quote: The framework integrates three mechanisms: (1) Turning Ratio Randomization, a training strategy that exposes agents to dynamic turning probabilities to enhance robustness against unseen scenarios; (2) a stability-oriented Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space; and (3) a Neighbor-Based Observation scheme

claims.text: Turning Ratio Randomization is a training strategy that exposes agents to dynamic turning probabilities to enhance robustness against unseen scenarios.
claims.source_quote: Turning Ratio Randomization, a training strategy that exposes agents to dynamic turning probabilities to enhance robustness against unseen scenarios

claims.text: The Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space balances responsiveness and precision through cyclical, exponential phase adjustments.
claims.source_quote: a stability-oriented Exponential Phase Duration Adjustment action space, which balances responsiveness and precision through cyclical, exponential phase adjustments

claims.text: The Neighbor-Based Observation scheme utilizes the MAPPO algorithm with Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution.
claims.source_quote: a Neighbor-Based Observation scheme utilizing the MAPPO algorithm with Centralized Training with Decentralized Execution (CTDE)

claims.text: The Neighbor-Based Observation approach with centralized updates approximates the efficacy of global observations while maintaining scalable local communication.
claims.source_quote: By leveraging centralized updates, this approach approximates the efficacy of global observations while maintaining scalable local communication.

claims.text: The proposed framework outperforms standard RL baselines in experimental results.
claims.source_quote: Experimental results demonstrate that our framework outperforms standard RL baselines

claims.text: The proposed framework reduces average waiting time by over 10% compared to standard RL baselines.
claims.source_quote: reducing average waiting time by over 10%

claims.text: The proposed model exhibits superior generalization in unseen traffic scenarios.
claims.source_quote: The proposed model exhibits superior generalization in unseen traffic scenarios

claims.text: The proposed model maintains high control stability.
claims.source_quote: maintains high control stability, offering a practical solution for adaptive signal control

claims.text: Turning Ratio Randomization enhances robustness against unseen traffic scenarios.
claims.source_quote: Turning Ratio Randomization, a training strategy that exposes agents to dynamic turning probabilities to enhance robustness against unseen scenarios
